name: Peppercorn Sauce/bf
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the steaks dry and season with salt and pepper.
2. In a heavy skillet, heat the butter over moderately high heat until it is hot.
3. Saute the steaks for 3 minutes on each side for medium rare.
4. Transfer the steaks to a warm platter and keep warm, covered loosely in the oven.
5. Add sherry to the skillet and deglaze it by scraping up the brown bits, stirring until it boils.
6. Reduce the sherry by half and add cream and peppercorns, stirring until slightly thickened.
7. Add the steaks back into the skillet and simmer for 1 minute, turning them to coat with the sauce.
8. Transfer the steaks to a heated platter.
